title: Raw Expeditions – Raw Expeditions is a premier adventure travel company based in Mumbai, India, specializing in curated wildlife and wilderness experiences across the globe. Our expeditions are designed for those seeking immersive encounters with nature's most captivating spectacles. Our Signature Expeditions: The Great Migration in Kenya: Witness the awe-inspiring migration season in the savannas of Kenya, where millions of wildebeest and zebras traverse the plains. Bengal Tigers of India: Explore the dense jungles of India, home to the highest population of Bengal tigers, and observe these majestic predators in their natural habitat. Arctic Adventures in Norway: Venture into the Arctic wilderness of Norway and beyond, experiencing the pristine beauty of polar landscapes and unique wildlife. Overland Journeys: Embark on extensive overland adventures that delve deep into uncharted territories, offering unparalleled access to remote ecosystems and cultures. At Raw Expeditions, we are committed to providing authentic and responsible travel experiences. Our team of seasoned expedition architects ensures that each journey is meticulously planned, prioritizing safety, sustainability, and profound engagement with the natural world.
